phases.name: Initial Build
scope: Generate spec.md, plan.md, data-model.md, contracts, checklists, and tasks from the large product request.
Keep the system narrow enough that later analyze passes can still repair it safely.
validation: Core artifacts exist and describe the same product.
The initial task graph is specific enough to review before coding.

phases.name: Pre-Implement Revision
scope: Run the analyze -> revise spec -> revise plan -> refresh checklist -> regenerate tasks -> score checklists -> analyze again loop.
Close contradictions before any implementation prompt is allowed.
validation: analyze no longer reports blocking contradictions.

phases.name: Strict Phased Mode
scope: Lock the backend-first phase order so implementation stays dependency-closed.
Refuse later-phase work in the current run.
validation: Every implementation pack names exact task IDs and validation gates.
No phase prompt includes later-phase UI work by default.

phases.name: Phase 2
scope: Implement ingestion, normalization, persistence, and replay-safe convergence.
Keep UI work out of the run.
validation: Replay and redelivery behavior proves ordered convergence.

phases.name: Phase 3
scope: Implement auth, capability resolution, REST APIs, SSE, and enforcement.
Keep the visual UI layer out of the run.
validation: Contract tests pass for REST and SSE surfaces.
Dedicated alert detail behavior is verified.

phases.name: Phase 4
scope: Implement the operator React UI, route map, live wiring, and degraded-state handling.
Build only on top of the validated backend contracts and SSE layer.
validation: No page depends on mocked production data.
